---
title: "test_code_sanitizer_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_code_sanitizer_empire.py"
loc: 16
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.63
style_score: 3.80
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.80
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_validate_syntax, test_repair_syntax.

## Interaction Protocol
Import test_validate_syntax and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.sentinel.code_sanitizer](file://src.sentinel.code_sanitizer)

### Exports
- `test_validate_syntax`
- `test_repair_syntax`
- `test_sanitize_code`
- `test_classify_error`
